nodes.name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Bowl
nodes.description: name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Bowl | short_description: Creamy apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats and milk, lightly spiced for a cozy breakfast. | meal_suggestion: Serve warm as a cre
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Bowl - name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Bowl | short_description: Creamy apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats and milk, lightly spiced for a cozy breakfast. | meal_suggestion: Serve warm as a creamy porridge; sprinkle with extra cinnamon and diced apple. Add nuts or yogurt for extra protein if desired. | nutrition_note: Fiber-rich oats and apple provide fullness; milk contributes calcium and protein; cinnamon adds flavor with minimal added sugar.

nodes.name: Overnight Oats — Maple-Kissed Style
nodes.description: name: Overnight Oats — Maple-Kissed Style | short_description: Creamy apple-cinnamon overnight oats with milk and yogurt for a quick, fiber-rich breakfast. | meal_suggestion: Mix rolled oats, milk, pl
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Overnight Oats — Maple-Kissed Style - name: Overnight Oats — Maple-Kissed Style | short_description: Creamy apple-cinnamon overnight oats with milk and yogurt for a quick, fiber-rich breakfast. | meal_suggestion: Mix rolled oats, milk, plain yogurt, diced apple, and cinnamon in a jar and refrigerate overnight. In the morning, stir and enjoy cold or warm; add extra cinnamon or chopped apple for texture. | nutrition_note: Balanced breakfast with complex carbohydrates from oats, and protein+calcium from yogurt and milk. Fiber from oats and apple; cinnamon adds flavor with minimal calories. If using plain yogurt and unsweetened milk, the total added sugar is low.

nodes.name: Ricotta Toast — Garlic-Ginger Twist
nodes.description: name: Ricotta Toast — Garlic-Ginger Twist | short_description: Whole-grain toast topped with ricotta, honey, and berries — a protein- and fiber-rich, naturally sweet snack or breakfast. | meal_suggest
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Ricotta Toast — Garlic-Ginger Twist - name: Ricotta Toast — Garlic-Ginger Twist | short_description: Whole-grain toast topped with ricotta, honey, and berries — a protein- and fiber-rich, naturally sweet snack or breakfast. | meal_suggestion: Toast the whole-grain bread, spread ricotta on top, drizzle with honey, and finish with fresh berries for a simple, balanced meal. | nutrition_note: Protein and calcium from ricotta; fiber and complex carbs from whole-grain bread; natural sugars from honey and berries. This combination makes a balanced breakfast or snack with a moderate amount of fat from dairy. Note: garlic and ginger are not included in the ingredients, so the 'Garlic-Ginger Twist' flavor isn't present in this version.
